description: Free worldwide geocoding from the OpenStreetMap project. Address → coordinates, reverse geocoding, place lookup. No API key required (subject to OSM usage policy: 1 req/s per IP, identify with User-Agent).

search.notes: Free-form geocoding. Pass q=<address>. Returns lat/lon + display_name. format=json default. 1-day cache (addresses don't move).

reverse.notes: Reverse geocoding. Pass lat=...&lon=... — returns formatted address.
